  • 树
  • 已过时
  • 索引
  • 搜索
  • 帮助

    序列化表格

    • 程序包 com.github.hsindumas.stagger.constants

      • 类 com.github.hsindumas.stagger.constants.MediaType

        class MediaType extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        2069937152339670231L

    • 程序包 com.github.hsindumas.stagger.extension.json

      • 类 com.github.hsindumas.stagger.extension.json.PropertyNamingStrategies

        class PropertyNamingStrategies extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        2L

    • 程序包 com.github.hsindumas.stagger.model

      • 类 com.github.hsindumas.stagger.model.AbstractRpcApiDoc

        class AbstractRpcApiDoc extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        -3116322721344529338L

        • 序列化字段

          • alias
            String alias
            controller alias handled by md5
            从以下版本开始:
            1.7+
          • author
            String author
            interface author
          • desc
            String desc
            method description
          • list
            List<T extends IMethod> list
            List of method doc
          • name
            String name
            interface name
          • order
            int order
            Order of controller
            从以下版本开始:
            1.7+
          • protocol
            String protocol
            interface protocol
          • shortName
            String shortName
            interface short name
          • title
            String title
            interface title
          • uri
            String uri
            interface uri
          • version
            String version
            interface version

      • 类 com.github.hsindumas.stagger.model.ApiMethodDoc

        class ApiMethodDoc extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        7211922919532562867L

        • 序列化字段

          • author
            String author
            http request author
          • clazzDoc
            ApiDoc clazzDoc
          • contentType
            String contentType
            http contentType
          • deprecated
            boolean deprecated
            method deprecated
          • desc
            String desc
            method description
          • detail
            String detail
            detailed introduction of the method
          • download
            boolean download
            marking download
          • extensions
            Map<String,Object> extensions
            extension attribution
          • group
            String group
            api group
          • headers
            String headers
            only used for generate markdown and adoc http readers
          • isRequestArray
            Integer isRequestArray
            torna request is array
          • isResponseArray
            Integer isResponseArray
            torna response is array
          • link
            String link
            link
          • methodId
            String methodId
            methodId handled by md5
            从以下版本开始:
            1.7.3 +
          • name
            String name
            method name
            从以下版本开始:
            1.7.3 +
          • order
            int order
            method order
            从以下版本开始:
            1.7+
          • page
            String page
            mark page
          • path
            String path
            controller path
          • pathParams
            List<ApiParam> pathParams
            path params
          • queryParams
            List<ApiParam> queryParams
            query params
          • requestArrayType
            String requestArrayType
            torna request is array-type
          • requestExample
            ApiRequestExample requestExample
            request example detail
          • requestHeaders
            List<ApiReqParam> requestHeaders
            http request headers
          • requestParams
            List<ApiParam> requestParams
            http request params
          • requestSchema
            Map<String,Object> requestSchema
            request schema
          • requestUsage
            String requestUsage
            http request-example usage(requestUrlParam + requestBody)
          • responseArrayType
            String responseArrayType
            torna request is array
          • responseParams
            List<ApiParam> responseParams
            http response params
          • responseUsage
            String responseUsage
            http response usage
          • returnSchema
            Map<String,Object> returnSchema
            return schema
          • serverUrl
            String serverUrl
            server url
          • tagRefs
            Set<TagDoc> tagRefs
          • tags
            String[] tags
            tags
          • type
            String type
            http request type
          • url
            String url
            controller method url contains server
          • version
            String version
            version

      • 类 com.github.hsindumas.stagger.model.ApiMethodReqParam

        class ApiMethodReqParam extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1140834362473560188L

        • 序列化字段

          • pathParams
            List<ApiParam> pathParams
            path params
          • queryParams
            List<ApiParam> queryParams
            query params
          • requestParams
            List<ApiParam> requestParams
            http request params(body param)

      • 类 com.github.hsindumas.stagger.model.ApiParam

        class ApiParam extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        -714676579813604423L

        • 序列化字段

          • children
            List<ApiParam> children
            children params
          • className
            String className
            param class name
          • configParam
            boolean configParam
            is config.json config param default false
          • desc
            String desc
            description
          • enumInfo
            EnumInfo enumInfo
            enum Info
            Use in torna api document
          • enumValues
            List<String> enumValues
            enum values
            Use in openapi api document
          • extensions
            Map<String,Object> extensions
          • field
            String field
            field
          • format
            String format
            The format of the parameter.
          • fullyTypeName
            String fullyTypeName
            genericFullyQualifiedName of type name
          • hasItems
            boolean hasItems
            openapi items
          • id
            int id
            field id
          • maxLength
            String maxLength
            Valid @Max
          • pathParam
            boolean pathParam
            PathVariableParams flag
          • pid
            int pid
            field pid
          • queryParam
            boolean queryParam
            query params flag
          • required
            boolean required
            require flag
          • selfReferenceLoop
            boolean selfReferenceLoop
            Self Reference loop
          • type
            String type
            field type
          • value
            String value
            param mock value
          • version
            String version
            version

        serialVersionUID:
        -8712793142951321786L

        • 序列化字段

          • apiDatas
            List<T extends IDoc> apiDatas
          • apiExceptionStatuses
            List<ApiExceptionStatus> apiExceptionStatuses
            http exception response status

        class CustomFieldInfo extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        -7310122325722122250L

        • 序列化字段

          • comment
            String comment
            comment
          • customRequestField
            CustomField customRequestField

          • customResponseField
            CustomField customResponseField
            custom response field
          • fieldName
            String fieldName
            field name
          • fieldValue
            String fieldValue
            field value
          • ignore
            Boolean ignore
            ignore
          • strRequired
            Boolean strRequired
            is required

        class DocJavaParameter extends Object implements Serializable

          • annotations

            String fullyQualifiedName
          • genericCanonicalName

      • 类 com.github.hsindumas.stagger.model.FieldJsonAnnotationInfo

        class FieldJsonAnnotationInfo extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        9003861567366363140L

        • 序列化字段

          • fieldJsonFormatType
            String fieldJsonFormatType
            the param type from @JsonFormat
          • fieldJsonFormatValue
            String fieldJsonFormatValue
            the param value from @JsonFormat
          • fieldName
            String fieldName
            field name
          • isIgnore
            Boolean isIgnore
            is ignored
          • strRequired
            Boolean strRequired
            is required
          • toStringSerializer
            Boolean toStringSerializer
            has Annotation @JsonSerialize And using ToStringSerializer

    • 程序包 com.github.hsindumas.stagger.model.grpc

      • 类 com.github.hsindumas.stagger.model.grpc.GrpcApiDoc

        class GrpcApiDoc extends AbstractRpcApiDoc<GrpcJavaMethod> implements Serializable

      • 类 com.github.hsindumas.stagger.model.grpc.GrpcJavaMethod

        class GrpcJavaMethod extends JavadocJavaMethod implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        -542118595043785188L

        • 序列化字段

          • methodType
            String methodType
            grpc method type.
            另请参阅:
            • GrpcMethodTypeEnum

      • 类 com.github.hsindumas.stagger.model.grpc.ProtoInfo

        class ProtoInfo extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        4962891140273167418L

        • 序列化字段

          • jsonName
            String jsonName
            json name.
          • protocGenDocPath
            String protocGenDocPath
            protoc-gen-doc path.
          • protocPath
            String protocPath
            protoc path.
          • sourceProtocGenDocPath
            String sourceProtocGenDocPath
            source protoc-gen-doc path in resource.
          • sourceProtocPath
            String sourceProtocPath
            source protoc path in resource.
          • targetJsonDirectoryPath
            String targetJsonDirectoryPath
            target json directory path.
          • targetJsonFilePath
            String targetJsonFilePath
            target json file path.
          • winOs
            boolean winOs
            is Windows os

    • 程序包 com.github.hsindumas.stagger.model.grpc.proto

      • 类 com.github.hsindumas.stagger.model.grpc.proto.EnumDefinition

        class EnumDefinition extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • 序列化字段

          • description
            String description
            The description of the enum.
          • fullName
            String fullName
            The full name of the enum.
          • longName
            String longName
            The long name of the enum.
          • name
            String name
            The name of the enum.
          • values
            List<EnumValue> values
            The values of the enum.

      • 类 com.github.hsindumas.stagger.model.grpc.proto.EnumValue

        class EnumValue extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        5233061948196060934L

        • 序列化字段

          • description
            String description
            The description of the enum value.
          • name
            String name
            The name of the enum value.
          • number
            int number
            The number associated with the enum value (optional, not used in current JSON structure).

      • 类 com.github.hsindumas.stagger.model.grpc.proto.Message

        class Message extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        8050823453899405074L

        • 序列化字段

          • description
            String description
            Description or additional information about the message.
          • fields
            List<MessageField> fields
            List of fields within the message.
          • fullName
            String fullName
            The full name of the message.
          • hasExtensions
            boolean hasExtensions
            Indicates if the message has extensions (optional, not used in current JSON structure).
          • hasFields
            boolean hasFields
            Indicates if the message has fields.
          • hasOneofs
            boolean hasOneofs
            Indicates if the message has oneofs (optional, not used in current JSON structure).
          • longName
            String longName
            The long name of the message.
          • name
            String name
            The name of the message.

      • 类 com.github.hsindumas.stagger.model.grpc.proto.MessageField

        class MessageField extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        5659801848035252488L

        • 序列化字段

          • defaultValue
            String defaultValue
            The default value of the field (optional, not used in current JSON structure).
          • description
            String description
            Description or additional information about the field.
          • fullType
            String fullType
            The full type of the field.
          • isMap
            boolean isMap
            Indicates if the field is a map type.
          • isOneof
            boolean isOneof
            Indicates if the field is part of a oneof declaration.
          • label
            String label
            The label of the field (optional, not used in current JSON structure).
          • longType
            String longType
            The long type of the field.
          • name
            String name
            The name of the field.
          • oneofDecl
            String oneofDecl
            The declaration of the oneof (optional, not used in current JSON structure).
          • type
            String type
            The type of the field.

      • 类 com.github.hsindumas.stagger.model.grpc.proto.ProtoFile

        class ProtoFile extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        2613283301423850262L

        • 序列化字段

          • description
            String description
            Description or additional information about the protobuf file.
          • enums
            List<EnumDefinition> enums
            List of enums defined within the protobuf file (optional, not used in current JSON structure).
          • extensions
            List<Object> extensions
            List of extensions defined within the protobuf file (optional, not used in current JSON structure).
          • hasEnums
            boolean hasEnums
            Indicates if the protobuf file has enums (optional, not used in current JSON structure).
          • hasExtensions
            boolean hasExtensions
            Indicates if the protobuf file has extensions (optional, not used in current JSON structure).
          • hasMessages
            boolean hasMessages
            Indicates if the protobuf file has messages.
          • hasServices
            boolean hasServices
            Indicates if the protobuf file has services.
          • messages
            List<Message> messages
            List of messages defined within the protobuf file.
          • name
            String name
            The name of the protobuf file.
          • packageName
            String packageName
            The package name of the protobuf file.
          • services
            List<Service> services
            List of services defined within the protobuf file.

      • 类 com.github.hsindumas.stagger.model.grpc.proto.ScalarValueType

        class ScalarValueType extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        -849952410928578937L

        • 序列化字段

          • cppType
            String cppType
            The C++ type corresponding to the scalar value type.
          • csType
            String csType
            The C# type corresponding to the scalar value type.
          • goType
            String goType
            The Go type corresponding to the scalar value type.
          • javaType
            String javaType
            The Java type corresponding to the scalar value type.
          • notes
            String notes
            Notes or additional information about the scalar value type.
          • phpType
            String phpType
            The PHP type corresponding to the scalar value type.
          • protoType
            String protoType
            The protobuf type of the scalar value.
          • pythonType
            String pythonType
            The Python type corresponding to the scalar value type.
          • rubyType
            String rubyType
            The Ruby type corresponding to the scalar value type.

      • 类 com.github.hsindumas.stagger.model.grpc.proto.Service

        class Service extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        -7186688057069473270L

        • 序列化字段

          • description
            String description
            Description or additional information about the service.
          • fullName
            String fullName
            The full name of the service.
          • longName
            String longName
            The long name of the service.
          • methods
            List<ServiceMethod> methods
            List of methods defined within the service.
          • name
            String name
            The name of the service.

      • 类 com.github.hsindumas.stagger.model.grpc.proto.ServiceMethod

        class ServiceMethod extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        8899124161932913904L

        • 序列化字段

          • description
            String description
            Description or additional information about the method.
          • name
            String name
            The name of the method.
          • requestFullType
            String requestFullType
            The full request type of the method.
          • requestLongType
            String requestLongType
            The long request type of the method.
          • requestStreaming
            boolean requestStreaming
            Indicates if the method supports request streaming.
          • requestType
            String requestType
            The request type of the method.
          • responseFullType
            String responseFullType
            The full response type of the method.
          • responseLongType
            String responseLongType
            The long response type of the method.
          • responseStreaming
            boolean responseStreaming
            Indicates if the method supports response streaming.
          • responseType
            String responseType
            The response type of the method.

    • 程序包 com.github.hsindumas.stagger.model.rpc

      • 类 com.github.hsindumas.stagger.model.rpc.RpcApiDoc

        class RpcApiDoc extends AbstractRpcApiDoc<RpcJavaMethod> implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        -3116322721344529338L

        • 序列化字段

          • childrenApiDocs
            List<RpcApiDoc> childrenApiDocs
            children
          • group
            String group
            group
          • isFolder
            boolean isFolder
            if this is group, then is true
          • link
            String link
            link
          • packageName
            String packageName
            class in package name
          • tags
            String[] tags
            tags

    • 程序包 com.github.hsindumas.stagger.model.torna

      • 类 com.github.hsindumas.stagger.model.torna.Apis

        class Apis extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        603355518657235962L

        • 序列化字段

          • author
            String author
            author
          • contentType
            String contentType
            content type
          • deprecated
            String deprecated
            deprecated
          • description
            String description
            api doc description
          • dubboInfo
            DubboInfo dubboInfo
            dubbo info
          • dubboMethod
            String dubboMethod
            dubboMethod, such as:com.xx.User com.xxx.UserService.findById(java.lang.Long id)
          • errorCodeParams
            String errorCodeParams
            error code params
          • headerParams
            List<HttpParam> headerParams
            header params
            另请参阅:
            • ApiMethodDoc.getRequestHeaders()
          • httpMethod
            String httpMethod
            http method
          • isFolder
            String isFolder
            is folder
            另请参阅:
            • TornaConstants.YES
            • TornaConstants.NO
          • isRequestArray
            Integer isRequestArray
            is request array
          • isResponseArray
            Integer isResponseArray
            is response array
          • isShow
            String isShow
            is show
            另请参阅:
            • TornaConstants.YES
            • TornaConstants.NO
          • items
            List<Apis> items
            items
          • name
            String name
            api doc name
          • orderIndex
            Integer orderIndex
            order index
          • parentId
            String parentId
            parent id
          • pathParams
            List<HttpParam> pathParams
            path params
            另请参阅:
            • ApiMethodDoc.getPathParams()
          • queryParams
            List<HttpParam> queryParams
            query params
            另请参阅:
            • ApiMethodDoc.getQueryParams()
          • requestArrayType
            String requestArrayType
            request array type object/number/string/boolean
          • requestParams
            List<HttpParam> requestParams
            request params; body params
            另请参阅:
            • ApiMethodDoc.getRequestParams()
          • responseArrayType
            String responseArrayType
            response array type object/number/string/boolean
          • responseParams
            List<HttpParam> responseParams
            response params
            另请参阅:
            • ApiMethodDoc.getResponseParams()
          • url
            String url
            api doc url
          • version
            String version
            version

      • 类 com.github.hsindumas.stagger.model.torna.DubboInfo

        class DubboInfo extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1556292473952962536L

        • 序列化字段

          • author
            String author
            author
          • dependency
            String dependency
            dubbo maven dependency
          • interfaceName
            String interfaceName
            dubbo interface name
          • protocol
            String protocol
            dubbo protocol
          • version
            String version
            dubbo interface version

      • 类 com.github.hsindumas.stagger.model.torna.EnumInfo

        class EnumInfo extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        -4902969363646799679L

        • 序列化字段

          • description
            String description
            enum description
          • items
            List<Item> items
            enum items
          • name
            String name
            enum name

      • 类 com.github.hsindumas.stagger.model.torna.EnumInfoAndValues

        class EnumInfoAndValues extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        6164712273272981975L

        • 序列化字段

          • enumInfo
            EnumInfo enumInfo
            torna enumInfo
          • enumValues
            List<String> enumValues
            ApiParam enumValue
            Use in openapi api document
            另请参阅:
            • ApiParam.getEnumValues()
          • type
            String type
            ApiParam value default enum; when type is not enum type, will set this type to ApiParam.setType(String)
          • value
            Object value
            ApiParam value
            另请参阅:
            • ApiParam.getValue()

      • 类 com.github.hsindumas.stagger.model.torna.Item

        class Item extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        -1517636497626246584L

        • 序列化字段

          • description
            String description
            description
          • name
            String name
            { * "name": "WAIT_PAY", * "type": "string", * "value": "0", * "description": "未支付" * }
          • type
            String type
            string, number, boolean, object, array
          • value
            String value
            value
